ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Women's, Men's, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the size (e.g., Kids, Adults) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the size (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style in the categories table */,
  "industry_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size follows an industry standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in the sizes table */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length measurement in inches */,
  "neck_circumference" REAL /* Neck circumference measurement in inches */,
  "thigh_circumference" REAL /* Thigh circumference measurement in inches */,
  "cuff_circumference" REAL /* Cuff circumference measurement in inches */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category in the categories table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the category (e.g., Kids, Adults) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the category (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer (e.g., Kids, Adults) */,
  "preferred_size_category" TEXT /* Preferred size category (e.g., Women's, Men's) */,
  "preferred_style_id" INTEGER /* Preferred clothing style (e.g., Casual, Formal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_style_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer in the customers table */,
  "bust" REAL /* Customer's bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Customer's waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Customer's hips measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Customer's shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Customer's sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Customer's inseam length measurement in inches */,
  "neck_circumference" REAL /* Customer's neck circumference measurement in inches */,
  "thigh_circumference" REAL /* Customer's thigh circumference measurement in inches */,
  "cuff_circumference" REAL /* Customer's cuff circumference measurement in inches */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category in the categories table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit recommendation record */,
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's measurements in customer_measurements table */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size based on the measurements */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category in the categories table */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style in the categories table */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_customer_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_measurement_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("customer_measurement_id")
)
